title: Meaty Australian Lamb Skewers
description: A winey, gooey, show-off Australian dish featuring dried leaves of summer savoury and pickle, perfect for high-protein diets
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together red wine, olive oil, garlic, pickle relish, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Sprinkle the dried summer savoury leaves over the lamb cubes
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of cooking
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving
